title: The Real Cost of NOT Using AI in Professional Services (2026 Edition)
pageTitle: The Real Cost of NOT Using AI in Professional Services (2026 Edition) — Last Rev
description: Professional services firms without AI lose 25-40% in efficiency, bleed talent, and fall behind on every bid. Here's what inaction actually costs in 2026.
author: Last Rev Team
